name: tpi-region-apac
description: Regional index for APAC — frontier-shaped models available in AWS ap-southeast-1 (Bedrock) and Azure southeastasia (OpenAI Service). Same 19-member candidate set as TPI-USEast / TPI-EU. APAC coverage is materially thinner: most third-party Bedrock models (Mistral, Llama, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, GPT-OSS) are not yet in Singapore in our catalog, and Azure SEA lacks the o1/o3 reasoning models. The geometric mean computes over the small set that is regionally available — typically only Amazon Nova + Azure GPT-4.x. This honest gap is the story.
selection_rule: frontier-shaped families with per-region pricing in aws-pricelist (ap-southeast-1) or azure-retail (southeastasia)

members.label: Mistral Large 3
members.note: Mistral has no Singapore SKU in our catalog — expected unresolved.
